scripts.start: unset npm_config_prefix && . ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent && node server/index.js
scripts.dev: unset npm_config_prefix && . ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent && nodemon server/index.js
scripts.admin: unset npm_config_prefix && . ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent && node server/cli.js
